parts.text: My phone is 0300-9876543. There is a strong smell of gas in my kitchen and I can hear hissing near the stove.
There is a fire in the living room! Smoke is spreading and my kids are upstairs. What do I do?
My father suddenly collapsed and is not responding. He is breathing but unconscious on the floor.
What is the best recipe for biryani?
I am stuck in traffic and my 8-year-old child is home alone. They just called me saying they heard a strange sound outside and are scared.
There are sparks coming from the electrical socket in my bedroom and I can smell burning plastic.
